steps.notes: Queried Notion AI Brief Story Pool (data_source: b56f7118-384a-82c2-82da-072d4aace5ed) for Status=Candidate rows. Applied Date Added >= 2026-06-05 filter (last 7 days) per user feedback from previous run. 23 total Candidate rows in pool; only 2 passed the date filter: (1) OpenAI Dreaming memory system (Date Added: June 5, W23, relevant to M&T Bank and Brown Advisory), (2) Meta Business Agent for WhatsApp/Messenger (Date Added: June 7, W23, relevant to all 7 clients). Alpine Associates has zero candidates after filtering. The remaining 21 rows had Date Added from May 25 to June 4 and were excluded. This is a thin candidate pool for a Friday assembly — the Date Added window may need calibration since most W23 stories were added earlier in the week. Staged to workspace/run/brief-assembly/notion-candidates.json grouped by client.
actions: Applied Date Added >= 2026-06-05 filter per feedback correction
